evals.prompt: 我想查一下 subnet 5 的详细信息，包括 skills URI 和 alpha token 价格
evals.expected_output: Agent fetches GET /subnets/5, GET /subnets/5/skills, GET /tokens/alpha/5/price in parallel, displays subnet info with formatted amounts and short addresses

evals.prompt: 帮我把 10000 AWP 存入 StakeNFT，锁 26 个 epoch，然后全部分配给 agent 0xAbCdEf1234567890AbCdEf1234567890AbCdEf12 的 subnet 3
evals.expected_output: Agent checks wallet dependency, approves AWP to StakeNFT (not RootNet), waits for receipt, deposits, then allocates. Shows confirmation before each write tx. Uses awp-wallet approve with correct spender.

evals.prompt: 我要给 proposal 42 投赞成票，用我所有的 position NFT
evals.expected_output: Agent fetches positions, fetches proposalEpoch(42), filters tokenIds by createdEpoch <= proposalEpoch, encodes with encodeAbiParameters (not encodePacked), calls castVoteWithReasonAndParams with support=1. Does NOT use castVote().
